features: Multifunctional Gift Bags - GIFTSAY white paper bags measure 15X8X21cm. Comes in a pack of 30 bags. Can be used as small gift bags, welcome bags, party bags, shopping bags, retail bags, merchandise bags or food service takeout bags. They are great gift bags for party, wedding, baby shower, birthday, anniversary, festival, graduation, etc. Paper bags with handles also are a popular choice among many retailers.

Eco-friendly White Gift Bags - GIFTSAY paper bags are made of premium recyclable paper. They are environment-friendly, durable, and reusable. Eco-friendly and great for giving gifts or retail use. Great for packing gifts, groceries, merchandise, or takeout meals. Our paper bags are recyclable, compostable, and a great alternative to plastic bags.

Sturdy Gift Bags - These sturdy gift bags are made of 120g basis weight paper and have well constructed paper twist handles. Each bag is 0.15mm thick, more durable than 0.11mm thick of generic small gift bags and will not tear or rip easily. These gift bags can hold up to 10lbs each. The reinforced bottom also provides extra support while you carry items, ensuring that the contents will stay safe not fall through, unlike other flimsy gift bags.

Perfect for DIY - GIFTSAY brings you plain white paper bags that are great DIY and craft bags. Since the paper bags are not printed so you can personalize them with your own message or design. The thick paper bags can be painted, stamped, inked, printed and embellished in any way you please. You can decorate the bags with flowers, paper cut-outs, buttons, sequins, ribbons, etcs.

Shopping Worry-free - We are deeply committed to providing a superior shopping experience to our customers. We include a 100% satisfaction guarantee with every product. If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return for a refund or exchange. Our professional customer service representatives are ready to assist you with any questions you may have.
